issues.sample: I own a 2024 Genesis G90 with two active NHTSA recalls: 25V474 and 25V833. On April 19, 2026, the vehicle suffered a total electrical failure: “Check brake system” warning Engine would not start Electronic door handles failed; occupants trapped inside for over 20 minutes Turn sig

narrative.headline: What 2024 Genesis G90 owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 2 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Electrical System (50% of reports).
